name: Report a correction
about: A scenario is wrong, stale, or has a broken reference
title: "[Correction] <ID>: <one-line summary>"
labels: correction
---

## Scenario

ID and link to file.

## What is wrong

Be specific. Quote the line and explain.

## Evidence

Public sources for the correct value.

## Suggested fix

Optional — if you have a one-liner.
